title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TORIL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIBOJOC, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3358 57 OG No. 7, 1199 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 2813, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TORIL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIBOJOC, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Toril in the Municipality of Maribojoc, Province of Bohol, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Toril.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
